steps.title: Solve for y in terms of x
steps.content:
Starting with $7x - 4y = -84$, isolate $y$:
$$-4y = -84 - 7x$$
$$y = \frac{84 + 7x}{4}$$
Now we have a formula to compute $y$ for any $x$-value.

steps.title: Evaluate the formula at each x-value
steps.content:
Substitute each $x$-value into $y = \frac{84 + 7x}{4}$:
  • $x = 0$: $y = \frac{84 + 7(0)}{4} = \frac{84}{4} = 21$
  • $x = 4$: $y = \frac{84 + 7(4)}{4} = \frac{84 + 28}{4} = \frac{112}{4} = 28$
  • $x = 8$: $y = \frac{84 + 7(8)}{4} = \frac{84 + 56}{4} = \frac{140}{4} = 35$
The resulting $(x, y)$ pairs are $(0, 21)$, $(4, 28)$, and $(8, 35)$, which match choice A — A is correct.
